content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian came to the nearby Half-Tooth Giant City through the Gate of the Boundary River, which used to belong to the Half-Tooth Controller, and now it is several other Eternal Masters who manage this place, but they still give the Half-Tooth Controller the position of City Lord.

After coming to the Half-Tooth Giant City, Ye Tian immediately went to the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower.

The Banya Ancient Tower is not in the Banya Giant City, but on a boundary river island not far away.

Jiehe Island is a very common place in the Jiehe River, there are countless Jiehe Islands in the Jiehe, rooted in the Jiehe River, basically there is not much value, only a few Jiehe Islands will give birth to very precious treasures and resources.

The boundary river island where the Banya Ancient Tower is located is also called Banya Island.

Half Tooth Island is very famous, because the entrance to the Half Tooth Secret Domain is on Half Tooth Island, and it is precisely because of the discovery of the treasure of Half Tooth Secret Domain that the Half Tooth Secret Domain will establish the Half Tooth Ancient Tower on Half Tooth Island. "Two-Five-Three"

Wow!

Ye Tian landed on Banya Island, where there were many, many peak Legendary Realm lords, all waiting for the Banya Ancient Tower to appear.

The Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda is usually hidden in a special time and space, and the peak Legendary Realm lord has no way to perceive it, and only in a special period will the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda appear.

And soon, the half-toothed ancient tower will be born.

After Ye Tian came here, the copying talent immediately unfolded, enveloping the entire audience, probing the talent of the peak Legendary Realm Lord here.

These peak Legendary Realm Lords are basically very talented, and many of them have Legendary-level ancestral endowments.

Ye Tian didn't look down on these legendary-level ancestral endowments, he just wanted to copy the control-level ancestral endowments.

"There really is a mastery-level time ancestor!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

This mastery-level Time Ancestor came from a fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord, who was a giant dragon, but appeared here in human form.

Ye Tian guessed that he was Lord Ouyu.

"Sure enough, it's the right place, this Ouyu Lord really has a control-level time ancestor!"

Ye Tian immediately copied the other party's control-level time ancestor, and he was quite excited in his heart.

In this way, he has gathered the mastery-level time ancestor and the mastery-level space ancestor, and the speed of his space-time fusion in the future will inevitably be extremely fast, or it won't be long before he can completely carry out the space-time fusion to the extreme, so as to step into the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord realm, instead of just reaching the combat power now, and the realm is still in the third-level peak Legendary Realm Lord.

After copying this mastery-level Time Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian immediately began to fuse, and at the same time waited for the opening of the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda.

Some time passed, and space-time distorted.

An ancient pagoda is now alive!

Bang!!!!

Perched on a mountain peak on the island of Banya, the tower's power has made all the lords of the peak Legendary Realm feel the power of this tower, and it also contains the breath of the eternal master.

Click!

The gate of the Half-Tooth Ancient Pagoda was opened, and any peak Legendary Realm Lord could enter this Half-Tooth Ancient Tower.

Whoa!!

One by one, the peak Legendary Realm Lords entered the Half Tooth Ancient Tower, but Ye Tian was not in a hurry, he was fusing the control-level Time Ancestor Fu, there was no need to rush in.

When the other peak Legendary Realm lords entered, he could just take a look at the excitement.

The situation in the Half Tooth Ancient Tower, Ye Tian naturally couldn't see it, but the Half Tooth Ancient Tower could show the progress of a peak Legendary Realm Lord breaking into the tower, whoever passed the first level, and who passed the second level, could see it clearly.

Time passed slowly, and soon, someone made it through the first hurdle.

The difficulty of the first level is not great, so there are many peak legendary realm lords who have passed through, and many peak legendary realm lords do not pay much attention, if someone breaks through to the fifth level, it may be enough to attract the attention of others.

Some of the peak Legendary Realm lords who had not entered the Half Tooth Ancient Pagoda were also discussing the Half Tooth Ancient Pagoda at this time.

Before, Ye Tian didn't know much about the situation of the Banya Ancient Tower, but as everyone told about it, he gradually understood.

The level of the half-tooth ancient tower is almost fixed, the first level, the second level, and the third level test are comprehension, if the comprehension is very good, you can pass the first three levels, and the fourth and fifth levels test the understanding of the Tao, the more you control, the greater the chance of breaking through.

On the contrary, if you only control a few paths, even if your combat power reaches the fifth peak Legendary Realm Lord level, it will be difficult to pass the fourth and fifth levels.

In fact, not only the Half Tooth Ancient Pagoda has such high requirements for Dao, but the Eternal Hall also has such high requirements for members who join the Eternal Palace, such as Ye Tian joining the Eternal Palace, one of the conditions is to control the three hundred Dao.

Ye Tian guessed that the more Dao he controlled, the greater hope he had in the future to be promoted to the Eternal Master, so the Eternal Master had high requirements for controlling many Dao.

The sixth level tests the understanding and perception of space-time fusion, although the fourth peak legend realm lord has carried out space-time fusion to the peak, but the use is different, if the use is very shallow, it will not be able to pass the sixth level.

The seventh level is for the ability to create, not to create time and space control skills, but to create secret techniques according to the requirements of the Half Tooth Ancient Tower, which is very difficult and has time requirements.

Even a half-step Eternal Master, it would be difficult for him to pass the seventh level.

However, the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower does not allow the half-step Eternal Controller to break through the level, and the highest is only allowed to the Fifth Peak Legendary Realm Lord to break through the level, so it is extremely rare to be able to break through the seventh level.

As for the eighth level, it is not clear what is assessed, it is rumored that the eighth level failed the assessment, and there is no memory of the eighth level at all, and the content of the eighth level will not be revealed.

As a result, they don't know what the eighth level is.

this day.

Ye Tian had finally completely fused the mastery-level Time Ancestor Fu, and his other copy bodies were already cultivating the Comprehension Time and Space Fusion with all their might, but now that he had suddenly improved his cultivation, it was a little unlikely.

"It's time to break through the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower. "

Ye Tian stepped into the half-tooth ancient tower and entered the first level.

The first three levels are to assess comprehension, and Ye Tian is naturally very confident in his comprehension, he even has a legendary ancestor-level comprehension talent, high-level comprehension talent is very rare, Ye Tian can obtain this level of comprehension talent, naturally also by copying talent.

Legendary Comprehension Ancestral Fu 3.8 plus his own basic comprehension, Ye Tian naturally didn't feel that the first three levels were difficult.

Airplanes!!!!

A corpse appeared in the void, it was the corpse of a life of the Boundary River, and dense Dao patterns appeared on its body, almost showing the Dao of its cultivation, which must be the masterpiece of the Half-tooth Ancient Tower.

At this time, the requirements of the first level emerged.

"Comprehend the Dao patterns on this corpse and show sixty percent of its ability to pass the first level!"

"Time requirements, one-tenth of a river year!"

Halftooth Guta prompted.

Therefore, without a strong understanding, you will not be able to pass this first level at all.

Under normal circumstances, the powerful peak Legendary Realm lord can pass the first level, if he can't even pass the first level, it will be really a bit embarrassing. _
